prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第18名，近年排名稳定在14–18名区间，属全国顶 尖高校行列；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学术不端事件（论文数据造假、院长被免职等），可能对部分考生报考心理产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第26 （较热），短视频平台曝光量中等偏上，整体关注度尚可；2022年曾出现严重投档断档（河南），2025年亦有投档线暴跌信号，历史波动较大；土木工程A+、城 乡规划学A+、环境科学与工程A+、管理科学与工程A+、建筑学A、计算机科学与技术A、交通运输工程A、测绘科学与技术A、海洋科学A、生物学A、工商管理A、风景园林学A等，A- 及以上学科共19个，工科实力突出，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业持续高热推荐，与同济优势学科 高度契合；江西省2026年普通高考总人数约474900人，较2025年（物理类266425+历史类206055=472480）略有增加，物理类估算约267800人，竞争基数小幅上升；省控线方面，20 25年物理类本科批429分、特殊类型505分，较2024年（本科批448分、特殊类型520分）有所下降，反映整体试卷难度或划线调整，未纳入位次直接修正；同济大 学位于上海，属一线城市，对江西考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在江西招生占比约3.3%（2025年），属中等偏下水平，非主要生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移 趋势、2026年招生计划小幅扩招、江西省考生总数略有增加、学校声誉偏负面但工科优势突出等因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次在2025年2578名基础上继续小幅后移；预测 最低位次约2622名，区间2323–2921名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were 1829 → 1824 → 1931 → 2297 → 2578, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 750 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 2578, a further backward shift of about 281 places compared to 2024, indicating increasing competition pressure; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangxi Province was stable at around 119 from 2021 to 2024, increased to 128 in 2025, and is planned at 130 for 2026, a slight expansion of 2 places compared to 2025, an increase of about 1.6%, which has limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 18th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking range of 14–18 in recent years, belonging to the top-tier universities in China; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (paper data fabrication, dean dismissal, etc.), which may partially suppress some candidates' application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking 26th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high exposure on short video platforms, overall attention is acceptable; there was a severe enrollment gap in 2022 (Henan), and signals of a sharp drop in admission cutoff in 2025, indicating historical volatility; Civil Engineering A+, Urban and Rural Planning A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Management Science and Engineering A+, Architecture A, Computer Science and Technology A, Transportation Engineering A, Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology A, Marine Science A, Biology A, Business Administration A, Landscape Architecture A, etc., with a total of 19 disciplines at A- or above, strong engineering strength, attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended, highly aligned with Tongji's advantageous disciplines; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangxi Province General College Entrance Examination is approximately 474,900, a slight increase from 2025 (Physics Category 266,425 + History Category 206,055 = 472,480), with Physics Category estimated at about 267,800, a slight increase in the competition base; regarding provincial control lines, the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch was 429 points, special type 505 points, a decrease compared to 2024 (undergraduate batch 448 points, special type 520 points), reflecting overall exam difficulty or line adjustment, not directly incorporated into ranking correction; Tongji University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, with strong regional appeal to Jiangxi candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Jiangxi is about 3.3% (2025), at a medium-to-low level, not a major source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan, the slight increase in the total number of candidates in Jiangxi Province, the somewhat negative university reputation but strong engineering advantages, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 2578; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2622, with a range of 2323–2921.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 2323–2921, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 2300), focus on sprinting for the Guohao Elite Class and Excellence Plan Class; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 2900), mainly consider Tier 3 medical majors and Science Experimental Class, while also considering Tier 2 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including former Liberal Arts) were 487 → 521 → 437 → 469 → 386, showing overall significant fluctuation. In 2025, the ranking notably advanced to 386th, moving forward by about 83 places compared to 2024, marking the best level in the past five years. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Jiangxi Province was stable at 17 students from 2021 to 2023, dropped to 16 in 2024, sharply reduced to 11 in 2025, and maintained at 11 for 2026, unchanged from 2025, indicating a clear trend of enrollment reduction in recent years.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 18th, belonging to the top tier of national universities. Its 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct incidents. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 26th (relatively hot), with overall attention at a medium-high level. Regarding historical admission anomalies, the 2022 Henan enrollment gap incident had a significant impact, but it has been gradually absorbed in recent years. Disciplines such as Foreign Languages and Literature (A-), Marxist Theory (A-), and Business Administration (A) show that liberal arts discipline evaluations are relatively weaker compared to engineering, but the overall university level remains attractive.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has high social popularity but with clear differentiation; Accounting/Finance/Auditing are recommended; Humanities (Chinese Language/Literature) are recommended. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Jiangxi Province general college entrance examination is approximately 474,900, with History Category estimated at about 207,000, a slight increase from 2025 (206,055). Regarding provincial control lines, in 2025, the History Category undergraduate batch line was 486 points and the special type line was 539 points, both increased compared to 2024 (undergraduate batch 463 points, special type 532 points). Tongji University is located in Shanghai, which also has strong regional appeal for liberal arts candidates. The university enrolls only 11 students in History Category in Jiangxi, a very small-scale enrollment, making ranking fluctuations easily influenced by the choices of a few high-scoring candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the 2025 ranking is already at the best level in the past five years, the enrollment plan remains unchanged without further reduction, the total number of candidates has slightly increased, and the university's reputation is somewhat negative, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly decline compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 401st, with a range of 351 to 451.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 351–451, with only 3 majors in History Category, it is recommended to focus on Law and Accounting as primary targets, with the Humanities Experimental Class as a safety option. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 350), you can focus on aiming for Law. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 450), you should primarily target the Humanities Experimental Class.
